name: Empress Guo (Nüwang)
page_title: Empress Guo (Nüwang) 郭皇后 (女王) [Wei] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.short-biography: One of Cao Pi’s wives, said to have spread doubts about Cao Rui’s birth.
sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	郭皇后 (女王)


	 Simplified Chinese 
	郭皇后


	 Pronunciation 
	Guo1 Huang2hou4 (Nv3wang2)


	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Guō Huánghòu (Nǚwáng)


	 Wade-Giles 
	Empress Kuo (Nü-wang)

	 Birthplace 
	Xiping

	 Other Names 
	Empress Guo Nüwang, Guo Nüwang (郭女王)

	 Name Notes 
	Guo was known for her intelligence when young. Her father, impressed by her talent, gave her the unusual style name 女王 “Nüwang” (literally “queen regnant”). She appears as Guo Shi in Romance of the Three Kingdoms XI.

full_text:
Empress Guo (Nüwang) 郭皇后 (女王)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Empress Guo (郭皇后), styledNüwang (女王), was born in Xiping. One of Cao Pi’s wives, said to have spread doubts about Cao Rui’s birth. Empress Guo was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Empress Guo lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
